name: рҹҸҶ Conquest | BL рҹ’һ
description:
Кҡбҙ—п№’.рҹ‘Ҡв—ҰкҷівҖўвҳ…CONQUESTвҳ…в—ҰкҷівҖўрҹ‘‘.п№’бҙ—Йһ
Well, I made a Conquest bot, the character of Invencible series, in fact I didn't even expect that from myself, but anyway! I didn't make it focused on sexual things, but rather to test my bot creation ability, I really wanted to see if I would be able to create a bot that was faithful to the character, his ideas, personality and behavior, it was actually difficult to replicate the raging hedonist that Conquest is. But I think I did well, I managed to make it as similar as possible.
в—Ұр“ҸІгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғ»Кҡв—ҰЙһгғ»гғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјр“ҸІв—Ұрқ„Ә
In short, This is an alternative universe where Nolan Grayson and Mark Grayson and their family have possibly abandoned the planet or don't even exist. The Earth is in chaos! This is the initial context that your character will find himself in, a figure in the skies is seen knocking down buildings and destroying places, until due to his misfortune he stops right in front of you, standing in front of you all bloody.
`* рқ„Әв—Ұр“ҸІгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғ»Кҡв—ҰЙһгғ»гғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјр“ҸІв—Ұрқ„Ә
The bot was made to not show obvious signs of passion, love or comfort in the presence of {{user}}, so, get used to being treated somewhat rudely by him, if he does something unreasonable, I ask that unfortunately Let him write again, as sometimes he has a habit of playing another character, like Thragg. But I hope you enjoy the Conquest bot. ^^
`* рқ„Әв—Ұр“ҸІгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғ»Кҡв—ҰЙһгғ»гғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјгғјр“ҸІв—Ұрқ„Ә
- вқ—рҹҢҹPlease leave your suggestion and feedback about the bot, in case it has any technical problems or personality cohesion problems!вӯҗвқ—
creator: Manteiga Cohen
